Datamatrix - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Datamatrix is the class that configures the Data Matrix Symbology.
Datamatrix(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Datamatrix
This is the constructor of Datamatrix.
datamatrix - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the Data Matrix barcode reading capabilities.
DATAMATRIX_CHARACTER_SET_MODE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
DATAMATRIX_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
DATAMATRIX_LENGTH1 - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
DATAMATRIX_LENGTH2 - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
DATAMATRIX_LENGTH_CONTROL - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
DATAMATRIX_OPERATING_MODE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
DATAMATRIX_USER_ID - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
DatamatrixOpMode - com.android.decode.configuration中的枚举
DatamatrixOpMode is an enumeration defining the allowed operating mode for datamatrix barcodes.
DECODE_TIMEOUT - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
DecodeException - com.android.decode中的异常错误
DecodeException is used for decoder related errors.
DecodeException() - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.decode.DecodeException
Constructs a DecodeException object.
DecodeException(DecodeException) - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.decode.DecodeException
Constructs a DecodeException object.
DecodeException(String) - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.decode.DecodeException
Constructs a DecodeException object that takes a String parameter containing the reason the exception was thrown.
DecodeException(String, int) - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.decode.DecodeException
Constructs a DecodeException object that takes a String parameter containing the reason the exception was thrown.
DecodeException(int) - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.decode.DecodeException
Constructs a DecodeException object that takes a String parameter containing the reason the exception was thrown.
DECODER_BUSY_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.decode.DecodeException
The scan engine is busy, cannot accept commands.
DECODER_BUSY_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
The scan engine is busy, cannot accept commands.
DECODER_CANNOT_START - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.decode.DecodeException
A scan session cannot be started because a condition is not met.
DECODER_NOT_AVAILABLE_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.decode.DecodeException
The scan engine is not initialized or not connected.
DecodeResult - com.android.decode中的接口
DecodeResult is an interface passed by ReadListener.onRead(DecodeResult) to retrieve scanned data from the decoder.
decodeTimeout - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerOptions
decodeTimeout is the maximum time the scanner remains on without reading a barcode.
DecodingNotification - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
DecodingNotification is the class that configures the notification to produce on a successful read .
DecodingNotification(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.DecodingNotification
This is the constructor of DecodingNotification.
deliveryMode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.IntentWedge
deliveryMode indicates the method by which the intent is delivered.
DEVICE_SERVICE_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.device.DeviceException
It is a Device Service error.
DeviceException - com.android.device中的异常错误
This exception is used for device related errors.
DeviceException() - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.device.DeviceException
Constructs a DeviceException object.
DeviceException(String) - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.device.DeviceException
Constructs a DeviceException object that takes a String parameter containing the reason the exception was thrown.
DeviceException(String, int) - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.device.DeviceException
Constructs a DeviceException object that takes a String parameter containing the reason the exception was thrown.
DeviceException(int) - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.device.DeviceException
Constructs a DeviceException object that takes a String parameter containing the reason the exception was thrown.
Digimarc - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Digimarc® is the class that configures the Digimarc barcode ™ reading capability.
Digimarc(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Digimarc
This is the constructor of Digimarc.
digimarc - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the Digimarc barcode ™ reading capabilities.
DIGIMARC_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
disableInterception(boolean) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.input.KeyboardManager
 
disableKey(VScanEntry, boolean) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.input.KeyboardManager
/** Disables completely a single physical key, through the com.datalogic.device.input.VScanEntry data structure.
disableScannerPower() - 类 中的方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
 
Discrete25 - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Discrete25 is the class that configures the Discrete 2/5 Symbology.

This is the constructor of Discrete25.
discrete25 - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the Discrete 2 of 5 barcode reading capabilities.
DISPLAY_MODE_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
DISPLAY_NOTIFICATION_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
displayModeEnable - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerOptions
displayModeEnable barcode illumination management for capturing frames from displys or reflective surfaces.
DisplayNotification - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
DisplayNotification is the class that configures the Display Notification capability via a displaying message.
DisplayNotification(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.DisplayNotification
This is the constructor of DisplayNotification.
displayNotification - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Provides configuration for the display notification.
dnotification - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Provides configuration for decoding notifications.

DotCode is the class that configures the Dot Code.

This is the constructor of DotCode.
dotcode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the DotCode barcode reading capabilities.
